programmes.show_description: (1999) Billy Connolly stars as a reformed criminal, now a famous artist, pursued by vengeful cop Ken Stott in Anthony Neilson's thriller.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1965) Thriller. Sidney Poitier plays a photojournalist aboard a destroyer whose commander's obsessive hunt for a Soviet sub could plunge the world into nuclear war.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.
(1957) Second World War drama. Deborah Kerr plays a nun stranded on a Japanese-held Pacific island, with an untalkative marine (Robert Mitchum) as her only companion and hope of salvation.

programmes.show_name: The True Story of Jesse James
programmes.show_description: (1957) Robert Wagner stars as the infamous outlaw in Nicholas Ray's western, which follows the last 18 years of the robber's life.
(1957) Second World War thriller. Robert Mitchum stars as the captain of a US destroyer in the North Atlantic hunting down a German U-boat and its world-weary captain, Curt Jurgens.
(2020) Comedy-drama with Liam Neeson. An estranged father and son team up to fix up and sell an old Tuscan villa that their late wife and mother left to them.
(2021) Action thriller with Bob Odenkirk. He's just a dad who goes to work and takes out the trash. But really he's an ex-assassin about to unleash his true self... and take out the trash.
(2017) BAFTA-winning psychological thriller with Jessie Buckley and Johnny Flynn. A fragile young woman begins a potentially dangerous relationship with a mysterious outsider.
(2021) Ryûsuke Hamaguchi's triptych of short dramas tells the stories of three different women caught up in very different romantic relationships. In Japanese/subs.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1976) Touching romance starring Sean Connery and Audrey Hepburn. The ageing legend Robin Hood returns to Sherwood Forest and discovers that, while he was away, Marian has become an Abbess.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.
(1964) Adventure with Richard Widmark as a Viking who leads his men on the quest for a huge bell made of solid gold, but with Sidney Poitier, leader of an army of Moors, on the trail too.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.
(1971) Sci-fi thriller. When a space rocket crash-lands in the US, a fatal alien virus is released, sparking a desperate battle to defeat the extraterrestrial life form and save mankind.
(2019) Visually stunning sci-fi starring Brad Pitt as a famously cool astronaut sent to the edges of the solar system to save Earth from deadly power surges. With Tommy Lee Jones.
(2019) Wickedly funny comedy horror starring Samara Weaving. A bride finds herself being hunted down by her new in-laws when she's asked to observe a deadly family tradition.
(2022) Alex Garland's graphic, gory horror with Jessie Buckley and Rory Kinnear. A traumatised woman tries to find solace in the English countryside only to encounter some very odd men.
